meta.title: Sebastián Ponti — Senior Full Stack Developer
meta.description: CV of Sebastián Ponti, Senior Full Stack Developer focused on blockchain, infrastructure, and security.

summary.body: Senior Full Stack Developer with 15+ years designing and leading distributed systems, blockchain platforms, and infrastructure automation. I've held CTO and Tech Lead roles in production DeFi and social-web3 projects. Cross-cutting focus on applied security, secure development, and proactive vulnerability detection.

bullets: Web application development across multiple software factory client projects.
Introduced infrastructure automation from scratch: provisioning with Ansible and CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.
Smart log ingestion and AI-assisted analysis to detect suspicious activity and prevent incidents.
Platform for social mini-apps on X (Twitter), the multichain EVM counterpart of Solana Blinks.
Led the engineering team; designed every smart contract in the platform.
Built the NestJS API and a large portion of the SDK used by third parties to publish mini-apps.
Multi-chain integration with Avalanche, Arbitrum, and Celo. Shipped an MVP as a browser extension, then migrated to native X Cards.

cryptologic.intro: Consulting firm specialized in blockchain and cryptography, focused on financial instruments, smart contracts, and inclusion-oriented solutions.

projects.name: EMDX
projects.summary: Perpetual-derivatives DEX on Avalanche C-Chain. CTO and architect from day one.
bullets: End-to-end system design: Express API, WebSocket server for real-time data, Redis for shared memory and pub/sub channels, Vue frontend.
Forked and heavily modified Perpetual Protocol; deployed the project's ERC-20 token on Avalanche.
Built a dedicated Avalanche Subnet and migrated the DEX to it; bridged liquidity from Arbitrum via LayerZero.
Parallel deployment on RSK. Monitored Chainlink oracles and contracts through OpenZeppelin Defender.
Direct collaboration with the Avalanche Foundation.

projects.name: Sentinel Chain
projects.summary: B2B marketplace focused on financial services for the unbanked.
bullets: Designed smart contracts (ERC-20/721), oracles, DApps, and cross-chain communication with Ethereum mainnet.
Built the blockchain with Parity + PoA; deployed with Docker and Rancher.

projects.name: Bitsign
projects.summary: Blockchain as a Service that abstracts interaction with heterogeneous networks.
bullets: Migrated the blockchain infrastructure to Rancher, acting as DevOp.
Developed and maintained applications for the National University of La Plata and third parties (Rails, Sinatra, Symfony, React).
Continuous-delivery pipelines with Gitlab-CI and Rancher; early blockchain explorations applied to image validation and vehicle traceability.

earlier.label: Earlier experience
earlier.body: Developer at Latinmanagers (La Plata) and multiple freelance projects in PHP/Symfony, Django, and .NET for clients across Argentina, Uruguay, and Ecuador.

footer.hint: Tip: Ctrl/Cmd + P to export as PDF
